study.title: Annotated Brain MRI Review Build
study.curationNote: Human-editable target database for the finalized review bundle. Set includeInViewer=false to temporarily remove a structure from the viewer. Use quizQuestions for optional revealable teaching prompts.

image.name: T1 MPRAGE, FreeSurfer conformed orig
image.space: FreeSurfer conformed orig.mgz space; same grid as overlays

audienceLevels.label: Beginner
audienceLevels.description: High-yield first- and second-year resident anatomy.

audienceLevels.label: Advanced
audienceLevels.description: Intermediate and advanced targets for the full teaching set.
